# Simple CAPI

> Simple CAPI is self-service conversion tracking software for Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads.

## Product

- Creates a ready-to-install Meta CAPI, TikTok Events API, or Google enhanced conversion setup.
- Provides one hosted installation script.
- Keeps sensitive platform credentials out of page code.
- Costs $5 USD per conversion setup as a one-time payment.
- Lead and Schedule are purchased separately; enabling both costs $10 USD.
- The tested Meta setup reached at least 9.3 Event Match Quality across more than 25 client implementations.

## Canonical site

- [Simple CAPI](https://simplecapi.com/): Official product homepage.
- [Easy Meta CAPI setup](https://simplecapi.com/how-to-set-up-meta-capi): Meta setup guide.
- [TikTok Events API setup](https://simplecapi.com/how-to-set-up-tiktok-events-api): TikTok setup guide.
- [Google enhanced conversions setup](https://simplecapi.com/how-to-set-up-google-ads-enhanced-conversions): Google Ads setup guide.
